themes.headline: Crossed ₹7T AUM; equity mix at 64.3% on QAAUM basis
themes.detail: Actively managed equity at ₹4.4T (market share 13%); debt and liquid 13.5% and 12.7% share respectively.

themes.headline: Industry AUM > ₹61T — 7× growth over 10 years
themes.detail: ₹10T added in just 6 months; June '24 = 40th consecutive month of positive equity-oriented net flows.

themes.headline: Unique investor count reached 10.7M; quarterly addition of 2.3M new uniques industry-wide
themes.detail: Continue to be most preferred for individual investors (13.3% individual share).

themes.headline: Q1 industry active equity flows > ₹1T; ₹262 bn from 17 equity NFOs
themes.detail: Debt funds turned positive after 3 consecutive quarters of outflows.
